description_long: This muffin features a domed top with a rich, earthy green coloration covering most of its surface, accented by several tan, rounded patches and lines that create a segmented appearance. The base of the muffin is a warm, golden-brown, suggesting a well-baked, slightly crisp exterior. The green topping appears thick and textured, possibly resembling a matcha or pandan flavor, with the tan patches resembling dollops or embedded nuts. The surface is uneven and rustic, with visible cracks and crevices that add to its artisanal look. There is no visible wrapper or decorative elements, and the muffin sits alone with no supporting surface shown. The overall impression is of a hearty, visually striking baked good, likely to stand out in an urban bakery or café setting.
description: A rustic muffin with a domed, green-topped surface, tan patches, and a golden-brown base, featuring a thick, textured appearance and no visible wrapper.
description_view_0: The muffin is seen with a prominent green top, tan patches, and a golden-brown base visible on the left side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the segmented green top with three tan patches and a central tan spot, showing the muffin's rounded shape.
description_view_2: The muffin's green top dominates, with fewer tan patches visible and the base mostly hidden from view.
description_view_3: The golden-brown base is more visible on the right, with the green top and tan patches curving around the surface.
